security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:8090 http://127.0.0.1:8090 https: wss:; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'
